title: Fashionable high-visibility safety apparel
abstract: Embodiments of the invention comprise a garment; a first design comprising fluorescent material placed on the garment, wherein the first design is externally visible when the garment is worn by a wearer; a second design comprising reflective material overlaid on the first design to create a resulting design, wherein the resulting design provides 360 degree external visibility of the wearer when the garment is worn by the wearer; and wherein the resulting design is an artistic expression. Other embodiments comprise the steps of: creating a design, wherein the design is an artistic expression and comprises a first partial design and a second partial design; transferring the first partial design to a garment comprised of clothing fabric using a fluorescent material; and transferring the second partial design to the garment using a reflective material, wherein all the materials cause a wearer of the garment to have 360 degree external visibility.
claims: 1. A short sleeve safety garment, comprising: a first material that forms at least a torso of the safety garment, wherein the first material is at least partially formed of a fluorescent material; a first short sleeve that extends from the torso; a second short sleeve that extends from the torso; a first design on the first material, wherein the first design is at least partially comprised of a second material different than the first material; a first reflective material band that at least partially overlays the first design, the first reflective material band encircles the torso, wherein the first reflective material band is a contiguous, continuous, monolithic element about 2 inches in width; a second reflective material band that extends from the first reflective material band on a front of the safety garment to the first reflective material band on a back of the safety garment, wherein the second reflective material band extends over a first shoulder of the safety garment, wherein the second reflective material band is a contiguous, continuous, monolithic element about 2 inches in width; a third reflective material band that extends from the first reflective material band on the front of the safety garment to the first reflective material band on the back of the safety garment, wherein the third reflective material band extends over a second shoulder of the safety garment, wherein the third reflective material band is a contiguous, continuous, monolithic element about 2 inches in width; a first side panel that interconnects the front and the back of the safety garment adjacent to the first short sleeve, the first side panel made of a material different than the first material; a second side panel that interconnects the front and the back of the safety garment adjacent to the second short sleeve, the second side panel made of a material different than the first material; a first side design on the first side panel, the first side design different than the first design; and a second side design on the second side panel, the second side design different than the first design, the first reflective material band at least partially extends over the first side design and the second side design.
